channel.title: Automation on Christopher Hannan
channel.description: Recent content in Automation on Christopher Hannan

item.title: VM - Base Build
item.description: Update All Base Packages sudo apt -y update sudo apt -y upgrade sudo apt-get install software-properties-common reboot Install Additional Tools # Misc sudo apt -y install open-vm-tools sudo apt -y install python-pip sudo apt -y install python3-pip sudo apt -y install tree sudo pip install pyopenssl sudo pip3 install 'ansible==2.8.6' sudo pip3 install paramiko #Terminator sudo apt-get -y install terminator #Sublime Text wget -qO - https://download.sublimetext.com/sublimehq-pub.gpg | sudo apt-key add - sudo apt-add-repository "deb https://download.
